name: Captain Phineas Harke
description: Beneath the flag of the Dame de Grace sails Captain Phineas Harke, a man whose very name evokes tales of tempests tamed and treasures plundered. With red curls as wild as the seas he commands and an amulet bearing the weight of superstitions, Harke is a figure carved from the legends of old. Stoic yet kind, his heart guards secrets as deep as the ocean, leading his loyal crew on quests for glory that are as perilous as they are grand. Captain Harke's story is one of bravery, heartbreak, and a relentless pursuit of adventure, with every horizon promising a new chapter in the legendary saga of the most respected pirate to ever sail the tropical waters.
creator: BorutaDevil
